name: Close
description: Close is a CRM focused on sales teams that provides a REST API to access and manage leads, activities, contacts, and related CRM objects.

auth_methods.note: Close uses API Keys; keys are supplied via HTTP Basic auth (API key as username, blank password) or an Authorization header with Basic <base64(API_KEY:)>.

credential_access.note: API keys are created by a logged-in user in Settings -> API Keys in the Close dashboard; documentation shows a user can create keys from the UI. Docs note that if you don't see API Keys, organization permissions may restrict visibility (admin settings), but generally keys are self-service from the dashboard.

api_surface.note: The developer docs state the Close API is a REST API with a base URL and example endpoints (e.g., /api/v1/lead/). Official docs include API reference and SDKs for multiple languages, indicating broad coverage of product objects.

buildability.note: Public REST docs exist and API keys can be created self-serve in the dashboard, so a developer can build integrations today. Only potential blocker is organization-level permission settings may prevent some users from creating keys (requires admin in that org).

queries: Close API authentication API keys basic auth developer docs
